disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Visible dark-red urine with large clots, throughout the stream, on three occasions in 24 hours, with no pain on passing urine
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe what you saw in the toilet?
Does it hurt or sting when you pass urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The whole wee is dark red with big clots in it — it's happened three times since yesterday. The strange thing is it doesn't hurt at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Several weeks of burning, urinary frequency and urgency that were treated as a suspected UTI with no improvement on antibiotics
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any urinary problems in the weeks before this?
Have you been treated for anything recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For a few weeks I had burning and I was going to the toilet all the time, really urgently. The doctor thought it was a water infection but the antibiotics didn't do anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss of about 4 kg over two months with profound fatigue
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight without trying?
How have your energy levels been?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now you mention it, I've dropped about 4 kilos over the last couple of months without trying, and I feel completely wiped out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long heavy smoking history — approximately 40 pack-years
trigger_question_examples: Do you smoke, or have you smoked in the past?
How much and for how long?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I smoke — about a pack a day, and I've been doing that for around 40 years.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No colicky flank or loin pain, no fever, no rigors
trigger_question_examples: Any pain in your back or side?
Any fevers, shivers or feeling hot and cold?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, no pain in my back or side at all, and I haven't had any fevers or shivers.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not taking any anticoagulant or antiplatelet medication
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any blood-thinning medicines, like warfarin, aspirin or apixaban?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not on any blood thinners — I don't really take any regular tablets.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels lightheaded and afraid of collapsing; lives alone
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt dizzy, faint or lightheaded?
Is anyone with you at home?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel a bit shaky and lightheaded and I'm frightened I'll collapse — and there's no one else here, I live on my own.
